Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle….

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2014/2015 (CHE)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 24 FEB
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We sit down with ex-Premier League referee Howard Webb, to talk about his early days as a South Yorkshire policeman to becoming one of the most respected referees in world football. In this candid interview Webb shares stories of his rise through the Premier League ranks, culminating in the honour of refereeing the 2010 FIFA World Cup Final. programme.title: Undian Memang Salah Tapi Hasilnya Kita Berjodoh
programme.desc: Julia, who knew she was about to be married to Bimo, recklessly ran away from home on her dirt bike. Julia asked her best friend, Iis, to help her make arrangements while she was on the run. Bimo chased Julia in an open pickup truck. Bimo and his friends yelled at Julia to stop.

programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Bunga Hati
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Jongkong
programme.desc: Wan Ibrahim perlu mencari penyelesaian segera untuk melarikan diri daripada pakciknya, Wan Usin, dengan menjual beberapa jongkong emas yang dirompak oleh mereka, dan dia perlu melalui pelbagai cabaran.

programme.title: 3xtra0rdinary Love
programme.desc: Pelbagai rancangan di mana terdapat permainan dan rancangan bual bicara dengan selebriti

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Raja Pantun
programme.desc: Pantun pembuka bicara, dihoskan oleh Raja Azura. Dua kumpulan selebriti bertanding, masing masing menunjukkan taring.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Selepas bergaduh, Jessie lari masuk ke hutan diikuti Shah dan rakan-rakan yang lain. Akhirnya Shah menjumpai Jessie tapi mereka terpisah dari lain. Di dalam hutan kelihatan seorang sedang memerhati mereka.

programme.title: 1 Hari Bersama Idola
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat peminat-peminat yang bertuah menerima kejutan dari selebriti kegemaran mereka.

programme.title: Konsert Yang Paling Padu
programme.desc: Program nyanyian dan bual bicara yang menghimpunkan 2 penyanyi yang dikenali ramai. Mereka bukan sahaja mempunyai persamaan dari segi karier tapi juga profil peribadi.

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show
programme.desc: Pelbagai permainan yang menyeronokkan & menarik yang dibuat untuk pasangan selebriti yang sudah berkahwin, tindakan dan jawapan mereka yang tidak dapat diramalkan melalui kuiz dan permainan fizikal.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist
programme.desc: Mampukah selebriti-selebriti ini melakukan cabaran yang diberikan kepada mereka mengikut bajet yang telah ditetapkan.

programme.title: Rasa Nostalgia Ramadan 3
programme.desc: Menyajikan hidangan istimewa dari nenek moyang mereka dan membincangkan makanan nostalgia ketika menjelang Ramadan

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Kemunculan semula Munirah mengejutkan Jannah dan Syawal. Munirah yang merasakan Jannah merampas kebahagiaannya datang untuk membalas dendam!

programme.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban

programme.title: My Buskers

programme.desc: Saksikan geng mak-mak melakukan cabaran yang menguji fizikal dan minda mereka. Mampukah geng mak-mak menyelesaikan misi yang diberi?

programme.title: Proksi
